changelog:
- 新增配方编辑器：支持查看和调整图像中的颜色配方，修改后自动提醒重新生成
- 校准工具全面升级：上传照片后即可预览定位效果，支持手动微调角点位置
- 校准结果按色系分组展示，配方一目了然
- 修复校准配方颜色显示为灰色的问题
- 自动配色分析更准确，首次使用即为最佳效果
- 3MF 模型文件生成更稳定，避免导出损坏
- 下载文件名自动标注通道数，更易识别和管理
changelog_en:
- New recipe editor: view and adjust color recipes, with auto-reminder to regenerate after changes
- Calibration tools upgraded: preview positioning after photo upload, manual corner adjustment
- Calibration results grouped by color family for easy overview
- Fixed calibration recipe colors showing as gray
- Improved auto color analysis accuracy, best results on first use
- More stable 3MF model file generation, preventing export corruption
- Download filenames now include channel count for easier identification
